channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Spotify Expands Music Video Beta Test to Dozens of New Regions
item.description: Spotify adds music videos to Premium subscribers in new regions, improving user engagement with songs and artists
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft settles video gamers' lawsuit over Activision takeover
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Microsoft Corp. has settled a lawsuit from a group of gamers who sued to try to stop the company from buying video game publisher Activision Blizzard for $69 billion last year. Terms of the settlement were not disclosed.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Netskope Expands Data Protection Capabilities with DSPM Acquisition - Revolutionizing Modern Data Security Strategy
item.description: Netskope acquires Dasera to integrate data security posture management (DSPM) technology into its Netskope One Platform, expanding advanced security across multiple use cases.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: It’s your last day to comment on one of the biggest cybersecurity rules ever
item.description: Final comments on a Defense Department cybersecurity rule are due today. The Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification project is about to become a reality. The post It’s your last day to comment on one of the biggest cybersecurity rules ever first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: The Next-Gen CPU Showdown: AMD Ryzen 9800X3D and Intel Core 200K Arrow Lake-S
item.description: AMD Ryzen 9800X3D vs Intel Core 200K Arrow Lake-S: A showdown of next-gen CPUs, rumored clock speeds, and speculated prices.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Nvidia GeForce RTX 5070 Rumored to Get Multiple Versions: What's the Fuss About?
item.description: Nvidia might be planning multiple versions of its upcoming GeForce RTX 5070, including an 18GB model. We explore what this means for gamers and whether it's worth upgrading.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Hide and lock your apps on your iPhone with iOS 18
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson explores the iOS 18’s new features to hide and lock apps for better privacy and organization.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to translate your executive IT resume for a new industry
item.description: For IT leaders working in the public sector, tailoring your resume for private-sector opportunities can be challenging. That was the problem Christina Sewell, CIO at a government agency, encountered in considering next steps for her career.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How Ernst & Young’s AI platform is ‘radically’ reshaping operations
item.description: Multinational consultancy Ernst & Young (EY) said generative AI (genAI) is “radically reshaping” the way it operates, and the company boasts a 96% adoption rate of the technology by employees. After spending $1.4 billion on a customized generative AI platform called EY.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Murder trial of Nima Momeni in death of Cash App founder Bob Lee begins
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The murder trial of a tech consultant in the stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee begins Monday, a year and a half after the widely admired entrepreneur was found staggering on a deserted downtown San Francisco street seeking help.
item.dc:creator: JANIE HAR, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: House Democrats press tech leaders to curb hurricane misinformation
item.description: A group of House Democrats representing areas affected by hurricanes Helene and Milton are calling on the leaders of major technology companies to do more to combat the flurry of misinformation online about the extreme weather. In a letter sent Friday, Reps. Deborah Ross (N.C.), Kathy Castor (Fla.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Apple is inventing a reality distortion field
item.description: Apple didn’t cast much light on visionOS at WWDC this year, and it hasn’t received much attention since. But don’t mistake this something for nothing. Two recent events indicate there’s a lot going on behind the scenes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: IBM: 78% of mainframe shops are piloting, operating AI apps
item.description: AI is reinvigorating the mainframe and causing enterprises to rethink their plans for mainframe modernization.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: iPhone update allows users to text for help when there's no cell service
item.description: The new update allows users to connect their phones to satellite, as long its an iPhone 14 or later model running iOS18.
item.dc:creator: Kaycee Sloan, NewsNation

item.title: TikTok is designed to be addictive to kids and causes them harm, US states' lawsuits say
item.description: More than a dozen states and the District of Columbia filed lawsuits against TikTok on Tuesday, saying that the popular short-form video app is designed to be addictive to kids and harms their mental health.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, NewsNation
